_comment: Dreame events => Dreamcast, tank/relative steering (the GTA2 scheme): hold accelerate-forward, steer left/right on turns -- GTA2's movement is non-standard. For plain heading-follow movement use dreamcast_dpad / gamecube_dpad instead. 'keys' = the DC/Flycast binding (we run it there, never the PS1 one): X=accelerate (FWD), D=reverse (REV), arrows=steer. Edit 'keys' if your binding differs. Tune the turn pulse ms for sharper/softer steering; lower events.TURN_DEG for more frequent steering.
